string-array.name: you_safety_bullets
string-array.item: Never share OTPs, passwords, or banking details with anyone on the platform.
Meet first in public places; tell a friend or family member when you meet someone new.
Use in-app messaging until you are comfortable; avoid moving to personal channels too quickly.
Report fake profiles, harassment, or requests for money using Report on any profile.
Verify your profile with ID to build trust with genuine members.

string-array.name: you_terms_bullets_intro
string-array.item: This sample app is for demonstration only; no real matrimonial service is provided.
Do not enter real sensitive data; the app does not guarantee security of demo data.
We may update these terms; continued use means acceptance of the latest version.

string-array.name: you_terms_bullets_privacy
string-array.item: Profile information you enter in demo fields is stored only on this device for the session.
We do not sell personal data; a production app would describe data use in full detail here.
You may request account deletion where applicable in a live product.
